meanings.definition: any of numerous plants of the genus Capparis
pickled flower buds used as a pungent relish in various dishes and sauces

examples: the gang pulled off a bank job in St. Louis

meanings.definition: gay or light-hearted recreational activity for diversion or amusement
examples: it was all done in play
their frolic in the surf threatened to become ugly

meanings.definition: a ludicrous or grotesque act done for fun and amusement
